title: Dataset Manifest
description: Schema for a dataset manifest, defining identity, version, schema version, digest, and provenance.

version.description: Semantic version or revision of the dataset.

digest.description: Content digest (e.g., SHA-256) of the associated dataset.jsonl file to ensure reproducibility.

schema_version.description: Version of the dataset case schema used by the JSONL file.

provenance.description: Information about the origin and creation of the dataset.
